queries.question: What features are there in common for every onboard entertainment system?
queries.sql: SELECT Features.feature_name  from Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features join Features on Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features.features_feature_id = Features.feature_id join Onboard_Entertainment_System on Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features.onboard_entertainment_system_id = Onboard_Entertainment_System.id   GROUP BY Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features.features_feature_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features.onboard_entertainment_system_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Onboard_Entertainment_System)

queries.question: For every onboard entertainment system list all of the features.
queries.sql: select onboard_entertainment_system.airline , features.feature_name from Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features join Features on Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features.features_feature_id = Features.feature_id join Onboard_Entertainment_System on Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features.onboard_entertainment_system_id = Onboard_Entertainment_System.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?airline ?feature_name WHERE {
  ?onboard_entertainment_system_features a :Onboard_Entertainment_System_Features .
  ?features a :Features .
  ?onboard_entertainment_system_features p:hasFeatures ?features .
  ?onboard_entertainment_system a :Onboard_Entertainment_System .
  ?onboard_entertainment_system_features p:hasOnboard_Entertainment_System ?onboard_entertainment_system .
  ?onboard_entertainment_system p:airline ?airline .
  ?features p:feature_name ?feature_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What features are there for every onboard entertainment system?
